decoder_heading: I Don’t Collect Any Personal Information with My Mobile Applications
ident_heading: I Don’t Collect Any Personal Information with My Mobile Applications
heading_content_part: I Don’t Collect Any Personal Information with My Mobile ApplicationsWhen you download and use my mobile applications, I don’t require you to provide any information and I                don’t collect any information about you or your device. In other words, I do not collect information                such as your full name, address, phone number or email address.

decoder_heading: I Don’t Collect Information of Children
ident_heading: I Don’t Collect Information of Children
heading_content_part: I Don’t Collect Information of ChildrenMy mobile applications comply with the Children’s Online Privacy Protection Act. I don’t knowingly                collect personal information from children under the age of 13, and if in the event that a user                identifies himself or herself as a child under the age of 13 through a support request, I will not                collect, store or use, and will delete in a secure manner, any personal information of such user.
Location InformationI do not use or collect your precise geographic location.
Sharing of informationI do not share personally identifiable information (such as name, address, email or phone) with other                companies.

I use Support Information only to provide support to you.Contact MeIf you have any questions or concerns regarding this Privacy Policy, please send me an email atsupport@saisoft.io.
